description_long: This is a modern, full-sized tour bus with a streamlined, aerodynamic body painted primarily in white. The bus features large, tinted rectangular windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. On one side, there are artistic panda graphics and stylized text, adding a unique visual element. The roof is equipped with several skylight panels and ventilation units, while the front showcases a wide windshield and side mirrors for driver visibility. The bus rides on six wheels, with two axles at the rear and one at the front, and has a single main passenger door visible on the right side. The overall design suggests comfort and style, suitable for long-distance urban or intercity travel.
description: A sleek, white tour bus with large tinted windows, panda graphics, and a streamlined body, designed for comfortable passenger transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bus's clean white body, large tinted windows, and subtle 'TOUR' text.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide windshield, side mirrors, and roof skylights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring panda graphics, stylized text, and the main passenger door.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back window, taillights, and roof details.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, evenly spaced rectangular passenger windows per side, separated by vertical pillars, with two smaller windows at the front and rear.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: No distinct manufacturer logo is visible; only stylized 'TOUR' text and panda graphics are present on the sides.
